blockingIssues.description: `filterExportDataToTeamScope()` can retain unrelated users in scoped exports via comment-author collection, so `users.json` and validation counts can still include off-team data.
The import pipeline silently skips comments with `user: null`, dropping exported comments while still reporting success and breaking comment completeness/count parity.
`import verify` issue verification is identifier-based instead of mapping-based, so a skipped or mismapped import can still pass if another DB issue already has the same identifier.
`import verify` comment verification checks mapping/count existence only and does not validate exported content, timestamps, issue association, or author linkage, allowing corrupted imports to pass.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Reinforce in `cli-worker` that import/export features must read the legacy migration spec before implementing verify semantics.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `import-cli-commands` review found no transcript read of `docs/legacy/05_Linear_全量导出_迁移与导入方案.md` despite the skill procedure requiring it, and the resulting verify logic missed required mapping/content checks.
